articles.title: LAZ-MIL (1-0): mistake by Estupinan, Isaksen gives Lazio the lead
articles.summary: On a long throw from the defense, Pervis Estupinan loses balance and contact with the ball in the duel with Gustav Isaksen, who opens the left side in front of Maignan and makes no mistake, taking Lazio ahead.
